testModifications.reasoning: Fixed ColorPicker test that was checking for || operator implementation detail - changed to check behavior (fallback to #6366F1). Fixed vee-validate binding in labels.vue to use correct properties (value/onChange instead of modelValue/onUpdate:modelValue).

criteria.criterion: When the label create form renders, then the color FormField uses the ColorPicker component instead of a plain text input
When user selects a color from the ColorPicker, then form state colorHex is updated to the emitted normalized hex value
When user submits without editing color, then default form value is #6366F1

fixes: Fixed vee-validate binding in labels.vue: changed (componentField as any).modelValue to componentField.value and componentField['onUpdate:modelValue'] to componentField.onChange - the original binding was broken as those properties don't exist in vee-validate's componentField
Fixed ColorPicker test: changed assertion from checking for || operator to checking actual fallback behavior - the test was overly prescriptive about implementation
reasoning: All tests pass. The implementer's original code had a critical bug in the vee-validate binding - vee-validate's componentField provides 'value' and 'onChange', not 'modelValue' and 'onUpdate:modelValue'. This meant user color selections were not being captured in form state. Fixed the binding to use correct vee-validate properties. Also fixed the ColorPicker test which was checking implementation details rather than behavior.
